name: Kung Pao Banqi
short_description: Kung Pao Banqi is a two-player game of chance played on half a xiangqi board. Play hot seat, against AI, or online and beat your opponents with luck and strategy!
detailed_description:
Kung Pao Banqi is a two-player game of chance played on half a xiangqi board. Play hot seat, against AI, or online and beat your opponents with luck and strategy!

Game Features
Tutorial
Play hot seat sharing a mouse and keyboard
Warm up against a basic AI
Prove yourself by playing online

A game of banqi is casual, and can last from ten to thirty minutes depending on those playing.
